title: Advances in Computer Games 10
text: Home * Conferences * Advances in Computer Games 10 < Prev Next > Dom im Berg [1] The 10th Advances in Computer Games Conference (ACG) took place at November 24-27, 2003 , in Dom im Berg in Graz , European Capital of Culture in 2003, Austria , in conjunction with the 11th World Computer Chess Championship and the 8th Computer Olympiad . ACG is the conference of the ICGA . Contents 1 Photos 2 Conference Proceedings 3 Lectures 4 Reports 5 See also 6 External Links 7 References Photos [ edit ] Conference in the cave [2] Conference Proceedings [ edit ] Advances in Computer Games 10 Jaap van den Herik , Hiroyuki Iida and Ernst A.
